changes.reason: Batch D only. charm_wall_breakaway_long remains the cleanest convex VALID_0DTE sleeve by profile MAE and PnL/hour, but the base has loose structure admission at 1.0 higher-high. Raising to 1.5 tests whether the rare wall-breakaway trades need clearer continuation structure without touching pullback/charm-pin flow.

Pair the higher-high requirement with a 1-point higher-low floor so the wall-breakaway branch admits only supported continuation rather than unsupported wall chases. This is profile-local and avoids global veto tightening.

Keep the 12-point convex target behavior intact, but cap extreme ES-VWAP extension at 22 versus the current 25. Prior exit compression hurt; this tests admission quality instead of underpaying winners.

Hold the charm-wall box at the current 20 rather than reopening the repeated 25-point experiment. This makes the test a supported-structure and extension-quality probe, not a duplicate of the prior supported-admission expansion.

expected_effect: Should improve risk-adjusted quality by keeping the high-PnL charm-wall convex sleeve while reducing unsupported or overextended wall-breakaway heat. Main tradeoff is small-sample starvation: reject if charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL/hour falls below about 225, total net profit drops below 98% of run_044, or completed trades fall more than 10% without a material MAE/drawdown gain.
label: charm-wall-supported-extension-box
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long. The leader base is strong, and broad entry filters have recently damaged profit and MAE. The best next test is a profile-local charm-wall admission-quality probe that preserves convex exits, avoids the duplicate 25-point charm-wall expansion keyset, and does not disturb VALID_0DTE pullback, charm-pin, or 1DTE fallback edges.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long produced 7 VALID_0DTE trades, $1060.6 PnL, 224.54 PnL/exposure hour, no slow >=12h trades, and worst MAE -346.8, cleaner than pullback_long and charm_pin_pullback_long tails. Prior take-profit compression hurt, so admission quality is the cleaner mechanism.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Structure-Confirmed Extension Box
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small-sample edge can be overfit; stricter structure plus a 22-point VWAP cap may remove rare convex winners or cannibalize nothing, yielding lower net profit without MAE improvement.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway with price above charm wall, require-breakout true, confirmed ES higher-high/higher-low structure, and ES-VWAP extension below the overextension cap.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Total risk-adjusted score improves versus run_044, total net profit remains >=98% of run_044, charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL/exposure remains >=225, slow_12h stays 0, and global worst MAE does not worsen.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Current regime is a short 12.3-day, high-win-rate SPX500 long scalper with take-profit-only exits. There are no realized losses and no >=12h slow trades, but path stats show hid...

new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE toward <= -513 and preferably <= -403, retain >=90% combined pullback/charm-pin PnL, retain >=95% protected fast winners, keep slow_12h at 0.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call Wall Acceptance Isolated Sample Builder
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: At least 3 call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive standalone PnL, PnL/exposure >=150 initially, worst MAE <= -200, and total net profit >=98% of leader.
